title: critesion geniculatum
intro: Critesion geniculatum, also known as Brome or Brome Grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Critesion geniculatum include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive discomfort, and promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Critesion geniculatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
